column2: Case 3 — Add Dexterous Arm to Routing Station

Adds a Dexterous Robotic Arm to handle Route and Clip Cable — the precision station where the Stationary Assembler (28 ticks) exceeds the 20-tick target and the Arm (16 ticks) does not. The assignment rule automatically routes the Arm to that station. The Assembler alternates between Port A and Port B; the Arm handles routing continuously. Compare Part Cycle Time and throughput against Case 2.
